meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2025-07-31
### Added
- initial version of model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed
n/a

nodes.label: DigitalEngineeringMasterData
nodes.description: Aspect Model to transport structured master data – including product, material and 3D related data

nodes.label: engineering
nodes.description: Top node of the Engineering cluster

nodes.label: basicdata
nodes.description: Property representing/collecting all the Basic Data of the Digital Master Data Mdoel

nodes.label: digitalMasterDataID
nodes.description: The identifier of a requirement represented by a UUID, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: complianceData
nodes.description: Property representing/collecting all the Compliance Data of the Digital Master Data Model

nodes.label: softwareData
nodes.description: Property representing/collecting all the Software Data of the Digital Master Data Model

nodes.label: mechanicsData
nodes.description: Entity representing/collecting all the Mechanics Data of the Digital Master Data Model

nodes.label: electronicsData
nodes.description: Property representing/collecting all the Electronics Data of the Digital Master Data Model

nodes.label: validTo
nodes.description: The date on which this part was superseded.

nodes.label: validFrom
nodes.description: The date from which this part is approved.

nodes.label: supplier
nodes.description: The Business Partner Number Legal Entity (BPNL) of the Supplier, producing the part primarily

nodes.label: supersededVersion
nodes.description: Link to digital twin of the part superseding this one.

nodes.label: successorPart
nodes.description: Link to digital twin of the part superseding this one.

nodes.label: releaseDate
nodes.description: The official date when the part was approved.

nodes.label: partNumber
nodes.description: Unique identifier assigned to the part by the OEM or supplier (Sachnummer)

nodes.label: notes
nodes.description: List of notes that can be attached as additional information in engineering process.

nodes.label: nomenclature
nodes.description: Standardized name of the part based on its function or application

nodes.label: description
nodes.description: Detailed textual description of the part, including key Detailed textual description of the part, including key characteristics

nodes.label: category
nodes.description: Category, the part belongs to. Based on VDA 4993.

nodes.label: status
nodes.description: Status of the part exchanged.

nodes.label: version
nodes.description: Versioning identifier for design updates and modifications.

nodes.label: homologationApprovalNumber
nodes.description: Official certification number confirming compliance with regulatory requirements

nodes.label: safetyRelevant
nodes.description: Describes, if safety relevance is required

nodes.label: safetyRelevantFeatures
nodes.description:
Number of safety relevant properties according to partner

Daimler: DS und DZ Merkmale (Dokumentationspflichtig Sicherheitsrelevant und Dokumentationspflichtig Zertifizierungsrelevant)
VW: D und S Merkmale (Dokumentationspflichtig und Sicherheitsrelevant)
BMW: L und S und F Merkmale (Legal: Zulassungs- oder homologationsrelevant, Sicherheitsrelevant, Funktions- oder fertigungsrelevant)
GM / Opel: S/C und F/F Merkmale (Safety and Compliance / Fit and Function)
Ford: CC und SC Merkmale (Critical Characteristic / Significant Characteristic)
Fiat / Alfa Romeo / Renault / PSA: R und S Merkmale (Réglementation und Security)
Conti: D und W Merkmale (Dokumentationspflichtige und Wichtige Merkmale)

nodes.label: statutoryFeatures
nodes.description: Specifies the legal and industry standards the part complies with

nodes.label: securityAndEncryptionStandards
nodes.description: Defines cybersecurity measures implemented in the software

nodes.label: signatureSign
nodes.description: Flashware must be signed according to securtiy class CCC

nodes.label: softwareVersion
nodes.description: Defines the version number of the embedded software or firmware

nodes.label: materialData
nodes.description: Property representing/collecting all the Material Data of the Digital Master Data Model

nodes.label: geometryData
nodes.description: Property representing/collecting all the Geometry Data of the Digital Master Data Model

nodes.label: diagnosticsAndErrorCodes
nodes.description: List of standardized trouble codes used for diagnostics

nodes.label: flashingMethod
nodes.description: Flash type: the used method to update for example control units. For example UDS (Unified Diagnostic Services) Flash via DoIP (Diagnostics over Internet Protocol)

nodes.label: noteProperty
nodes.description: List of notes that can be attached as additional information in engineering process.

nodes.label: timestamp
nodes.description: Describes a Property which contains the date and time with an optional timezone.

nodes.label: versionNumber
nodes.description: The versioning follows the guidelines for semantic versioning of the SemVer Org

nodes.label: versionID
nodes.description: The identifier of this exact version of the Digital Master Data represented by a Catena-X ID or Part ID, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: density
nodes.description: Density of the material for CAD model usage 7850 kg/m³

nodes.label: materialDescription
nodes.description: Specifies the primary material composition of the part

nodes.label: materialID
nodes.description: Identification of the material from defined material database or standard

nodes.label: thermalExpansionCoefficient
nodes.description: Rate of material expansion per degree of temperature change; 2.3 × 10⁻⁶ 1/K

nodes.label: reference2DCADDrawing
nodes.description: Link to the digital 2D model used for design and manufacturing (external and Catena-X-internal ressources, URN's). Based on IDTA SMT 020026 - Provision of 3D Models

nodes.label: reference3DCADDrawing
nodes.description: Link the digital CAD model used for design and manufacturing (external and Catena-X-internal ressources, URN's). Based on IDTA SMT 020026 - Provision of 3D Models

nodes.label: boundingBox
nodes.description: The minimal 3D box that fully encloses the part geometry (length x width x height), units in millimetre.

nodes.label: boundingSphere
nodes.description: Diameter of the smallest possible sphere that fully encloses the part geometry. { "value": 315.0, "unit": "mm" }

nodes.label: calculatedWeight
nodes.description: Mass of the part, typically in kilograms. Calculated out of all belonging 3D-models

nodes.label: calculatedWeightTolerance
nodes.description: Tolerance range of the calculated (theoretical) weight of a part or assembly.

nodes.label: centerOfGravity
nodes.description: The calculated center of mass in a coordinate system for proper weight distribution

nodes.label: estimatedWeight
nodes.description: Estimated mass of the part, typically in kilograms. Based on early design assumptions or incomplete data.

nodes.label: estimatedWeightTolerance
nodes.description: Tolerance range of the estimated weight of a part or assembly. ±0.5 kg or ±2%

nodes.label: momentOfInertia
nodes.description:
Resistance of the part to rotational acceleration around an axis
 kg·m²

nodes.label: surfaceArea
nodes.description: surface area in mm2

nodes.label: volume
nodes.description: volume of the part in mm3

nodes.label: weightedWeight
nodes.description: Mass of the part, typically in kilograms. Calculated out of all belonging 3D-models (== Actual weight)

nodes.label: weightedWeightTolerance
nodes.description: Tolerance range of the measured or actual weighted weight of a part or assembly. ±0.5 kg or ±2%

nodes.label: boundingBoxPropertyLenght
nodes.description: The minimal 3D box that fully encloses the part geometry (length x width x height),  units in millimetre.

nodes.label: boundingBoxPropertyWidth
nodes.description: The minimal 3D box that fully encloses the part geometry (length x width x height),,  units in millimetre.

nodes.label: boundingBoxPropertyHeight
nodes.description: The minimal 3D box that fully encloses the part geometry (length x width x height),  units in millimetre.
